---
title: "Architecture"
description: "Internal systems, design patterns, and subsystem overviews for the RenderBrains engine."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "title asc"
  fields: [title, description, date]
---

Deep-dive documentation on the RenderBrains rendering engine internals: frame graphs, memory models, pipeline stages, and system interactions.

---

::: {.callout-note}
Architecture docs are published from `vault/` via `make sync`. To contribute, create a note in `vault/notes/` with `category: "architecture"` and `publish: true`.
:::
